_comment: 0.7.29 — re-parented to reach_income_250 (Pocket Change now hands the Leaf Stone directly). The separate receive_leaf_stone quest with its gym1+income AND-gate was deleted. Trigger is `minecraft:impossible`; cobblemon-bridge's `EvolutionHook` subscribes to Cobblemon's EvolutionCompleteEvent and calls QuestAdvancements.award(player, 'server:evolve_exeggutor', 'done') when the evolved species name matches 'Exeggutor'. Same pattern as PokedexProgressHook / HealQuestHook.

description.text: Use the Leaf Stone to evolve your Exeggcute into Exeggutor.
